searchLedger.hypothesis: Missing provenance columns do not crash persistence

searchActions.result: persistSourceKind returns when the database is absent or memory_index lacks source_kind (write-provenance.ts:119-127). persistProvenanceMetadata builds SET clauses only for existing columns and returns when none exist (write-provenance.ts:130-152). getTableColumns catches PRAGMA failures and returns an empty set (write-provenance.ts:96-104).

searchLedger.rationale: The schema guards correctly degrade to no-op when source_kind/provenance columns are absent.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Column absence is checked before UPDATE statements, and PRAGMA errors are caught.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Genuine manual no-provenance paths still derive human

searchActions.result: deriveSourceKindFromContext returns 'human' when no source/actor/tool/scope/path signal matches (write-provenance.ts:70-93). Direct memory_save only supplies explicit provenance when provenanceSource/provenanceActor are present (memory-save.ts:3519-3528), and human memory_update calls without __provenanceContext use the same default-human path.

searchLedger.rationale: Manual writes remain able to overwrite automated rows as intended; the unsafe case is automated callers that also arrive without provenance context.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No regression found for genuine human/manual writes deriving human.

searchLedger.hypothesis: createMemoryRecord validation, identity, dedup, lineage, and return path preserved

searchActions.result: Current createMemoryRecord still resolves record identity at lines 289-293, finds same-path existing rows at lines 312-319, retires predecessors before insert at lines 324-328, inserts exactly once through vectorIndex at lines 330-364, applies post-insert metadata at lines 375-390, records lineage/history at lines 405-448, and returns indexWithMetadata() at lines 450-453. The removed local source-kind helpers are present in write-provenance.ts lines 31-94 and persistence is centralized at lines 155-164.

searchLedger.rationale: The -107 reduction moved source-kind/provenance helpers out of create-record and replaced persistSourceKind with applyWriteProvenance after memory_id exists. I did not find removed create-record identity, validation, dedup, lineage, or error-handling logic.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Only provenance/source-kind persistence was centralized; core create-record behavior remains present.

searchLedger.hypothesis: memory_update constitutional/manual guard still protects automated edits

searchActions.result: buildGuardedUpdateParams derives sourceKind at lines 98-103, treats non-human as automated at lines 104-106, skips protected fields title/triggerPhrases/importanceTier at lines 112-123, and keeps protected rows' storedSourceKind at lines 130-132. The transaction persists source kind and provenance at lines 321-325, and the response exposes skippedFields at lines 516-523.

searchLedger.rationale: The -26 net refactor removed the local hasSourceKindColumn/persistUpdateSourceKind helper, but did not remove the constitutional/manual guard branches.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Guard logic remains intact and still skips protected automated field updates.

searchActions.result: processPreparedMemory still returns checkExistingRow before embedding/write at lines 2303-2314 and content-hash duplicate results at lines 2388-2399 and 2541-2555. dedup.ts returns status:'unchanged' at lines 291-301 and status:'duplicate' at lines 353-374. New writes still build status indexed/deferred/updated in response-builder.ts lines 319-326.

searchLedger.rationale: The provenance addition is not reached for direct duplicate/unchanged early returns, and new/update result shaping still depends on existing plus embeddingStatus as before.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No status or response-shape regression found for direct memory_save.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Publication-gate provenance fallback does not change search membership or ranking

searchActions.result: applyPublicationGateToResponse maps existing data.results after formatting at memory-search.ts:581-608 and is invoked after formatting/cache preparation at memory-search.ts:1345 and memory-search.ts:1357. It returns non-contract results unchanged at memory-search.ts:581-584.

searchLedger.rationale: The read-path change annotates existing result objects with publishable/exclusion fields and normalized provenance; it does not alter query, score, sort, limit, or result membership.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No ranking or membership mutation found in the changed search code.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Constitutional guard test still proves automated cannot overwrite manual

searchActions.result: The updated assertion still expects title to remain 'Wave 1 fixture', importance_weight safe-field update to persist, source_kind to remain 'human', provenance_source/provenance_actor to persist, and response to contain 'skipped to protect manual data' plus 'title' at lines 251-259.

searchLedger.rationale: The test was strengthened with provenance assertions rather than weakened; targeted Vitest run passed 4 files / 41 tests.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No masked regression or deleted guard assertion found in the four modified tests.
